data.title: Hy-Tek Intralogistics, VARGO®, and Zion Solutions Group Named Foundational Partners for the New Locus Robotics Array System Integrator Program
data.description: In Wilmington, Massachusetts, Locus Robotics, a top player in Flexibility-First Warehouse Automation, revealed Hy-Tek Intralogistics, VARGO®, and Zion Solutions Group as the Foundational Partners for its Locus Robotics Array System Integrator (SI) Program. This new SI program aims to speed up the implementation of Locus Array, an entirely autonomous fulfillment system capable of managing the entire workflow from start to finish without human intervention. This initiative demonstrates their commitment to progress and efficiency in warehouse automation.

data.title: SVM PR and Marketing Communications Receives Gold Merit Award for Excellence in Media Relations
data.description: A Gold Merit Award was achieved by SVM PR, a comprehensive agency focusing on healthcare, technology, and B2B communications, based in Providence, R.I.
TRUMP'S WORD ON POPE ARE UNACCEPTABLE, SAYS ITALY PM MELONI

data.title: Tom Lee Sees 'Mini Crypto Winter' Ending As Bitmine Buys 71,524 ETH
data.description: Bitmine Immersion Technologies (NYSE: BMNR) has recently acquired 71,524 ETH, pushing their total ETH holdings to 4.875 million coins, equivalent to 4.04% of the overall supply of 120.7 million ETH. This acquisition marks a significant milestone for Bitmine, as they are now 81% closer to their goal of owning 5% of the total ETH supply, just nine months into their campaign. The recent purchase is their largest since late December and reflects their confidence in the market. As of April 12, Bitmine's crypto portfolio includes 4,874,858 ETH valued at $2,206 per coin, along with 198 Bitcoin, a $200 million stake in Beast Industries, an $85 million stake in Eightco Holdings (NASDAQ: ORBS), and $719 million in cash, totaling $11.8 billion when combined with their other investments. Bitmine's Chairman, Tom Lee, expressed their optimism in ETH's outlook, attributing their increased buying pace in the past month to their belief that ETH is approaching the end of the current "mini-crypto winter." For more details, the complete article is accessible on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Belmont Village Senior Living Leaders Honored with 2026 TALA Hero Award for Senior Care Excellence
data.description: In Houston, the prestigious 2026 TALA Hero Award for Senior Care Excellence was bestowed upon leaders from Belmont Village Senior Living. This recognition highlights their exceptional contributions to the field of senior care.

data.title: Zales Unveils “Best For The Best” Mother’s Day Collection Curated by Ashley Graham — A Modern Tribute to the Woman Behind the Mom
data.description: This year for Mother’s Day, Zales is changing the way we honor the incredible women in our lives with the release of the “Best For The Best” jewelry collection. Teaming up with supermodel and mom Ashley Graham, Zales has curated a special line of jewelry to celebrate the women who do it all. This exclusive collection is only available at Zales stores. Following the success of their Not Another Candle holiday campaign, Zales is now launching the Not Another Bouquet campaign as a fresh and modern way to show appreciation to mothers everywhere.
WH 2026 Eco Report: OBBBA tax plan seen lifting GDP up to 4.9%.

data.title: Sensor Fusion Is The New Defense Frontier: AI Video Joins RF In The Race To Counter Drones
data.description: With counter-drone spending on the rise, nearing $20 billion, defense technology companies are enhancing RF-first architectures with visual intelligence to remain competitive. Key players include VisionWave Holdings, Inc. (NASDAQ: VWAV), Rekor Systems, Inc. (NASDAQ: REKR), Ondas Inc. (NASDAQ: ONDS), and Red Cat.

data.title: Wondercide Expands Household Line with New Pack-Friendly Disinfectant
data.description: Utilizing Hypochlorous Acid as its active ingredient, this new daily surface disinfectant effectively eliminates 99.99% of specified viruses and bacteria. Designed for use on hard, non-porous surfaces such as kitchen countertops, pet areas, and other everyday areas, this product allows families to confidently disinfect without fear. Operating out of AUSTIN, Tex., the company Wondercide introduced this innovative solution on April 13, 2026.

data.title: In HelloNation, Water Conditioning Expert Nathan Scheopner of Garden City, KS, Outlines How to Choose Water Purification Systems
data.description: In a recent article by HelloNation, Water Conditioning Expert Nathan Scheopner from Scheopner's Water Conditioning in Garden City, Kansas provided valuable insight on selecting the appropriate water purification system. The article, published on April 13, 2026, highlights key factors to consider when making this important decision. Readers can benefit from the expertise of Scheopner as he offers guidance on navigating the choices available for ensuring clean and safe water. Residents in Garden City and beyond can access this informative piece to understand the crucial aspects of choosing the right water purification system tailored to their needs. Scheopner's expertise sheds light on the best practices and considerations, assisting individuals in making informed decisions regarding water quality.

data.title: CHEMEON Surface Technology Elevates Leadership to Lean C-Level Team, Streamlining for Greater Agility and Innovation
data.description: Today in Minden, Nevada, on April 13, 2026, CHEMEON Surface Technology, a top provider of eco-friendly metal surface engineering solutions worldwide, revealed the restructuring of its executive leadership team. The company has elevated and consolidated its executives into a more efficient C-level structure. This move aims to streamline the decision-making process and enhance operational effectiveness.

data.title: Technip Energies launches its  2026 Employee Share Offering
data.description: Technip Energies, trading under the ticker symbol PARIS:TE, has recently introduced ESOP 2026, an employee share program aimed at around 17,000 qualified employees across 19 nations. The primary goal of this initiative is to distribute the company's enduring value generation among its workforce.

data.title: VALLOUREC : AVAILABILITY OF INFORMATION RELATING TO THE COMBINED (ORDINARY AND EXTRAORDINARY) SHAREHOLDERS' MEETING OF 21 MAY 2026
data.description: Vallourec announces that information pertaining to the Combined Shareholders’ Meeting scheduled for May 21, 2026, is now available for stakeholders. The meeting will address both ordinary and extraordinary matters. Shareholders are encouraged to review the details provided for the upcoming event.

data.title: IBA – ACQUISITION OF OWN SHARES
data.description: Belgium-based company Ion Beam Applications SA (IBA) has released details concerning its share buyback program, as required by the Royal Decree of 29 April 2019 pursuant to the Belgian Code on Companies and Associations. This information was disclosed on April 13, 2026, at 6 PM CET. The share buyback program was initially announced on February 2, 2026.
EssilorLuxottica reports transactions involving its own shares in a recent disclosure.
Planisware released a statement on its own shares dealings from April 6 to 10, 2026.

data.title: Ilkka Oyj: Acquisition of own shares on 13 April 2026
data.description: On April 13, 2026, Ilkka Oyj disclosed that they have acquired their own shares through a stock exchange release at 7:00 p.m. EEST. The company bought an undisclosed number of shares on that day.
Rexel reported trading own shares on April 07, 2026.
